requirement_text: Federate conformance claims shall be backed by evidence that the federate uses the standard HLA services, callbacks, object models, and language binding correctly.
notes: This imported federate-conformance row is partially covered by the repo-wide requirements harmonization index, explicit requirement markers, and ambassador-binding traceability, but the broad clause-13 federate conformance package claim remains wider than current direct proof.

requirement_text: RTI conformance claims shall be backed by evidence that the RTI implements the standard services, exceptions, callbacks, MOM/MIM behavior, language bindings, and OMT/FDD handling.
notes: This imported RTI-conformance row is partially covered by the repo-wide requirements harmonization index, API traceability, MOM/MIM evidence, and imported packet verification, but the broad clause-13 RTI conformance package claim remains wider than current direct proof.
